parameters.content:
## 🤖 L2LAAF Orchestrator
**Phase:** 45.5
**Feature:** Phase 45.5 Three-Option HITL Gate & Polling

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "cardsV2": [ { "cardId": "l2laaf_error_gate", "card": { "header": { "title": "🚨 n8n Workflow Error", "subtitle": "L2LAAF Autonomous Orchestrator" }, "sections": [{ "widgets": [ { "textParagraph": { "text": "Failing Node:
" + $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted + "

Error Message:
" + $json.execution.error.message + "

Error Description:
" + ($json.execution.error.description || \"none\") + "

Cause:
" + (JSON.stringify($json.execution.error.cause || {}) || \"none\") } } ] }] } } ] } }}

={{ { "cardsV2": [ { "cardId": "l2laaf_blocked_gate", "card": { "header": { "title": "⛔ L2LAAF Deployment BLOCKED: Phase " + $json.meta.current_version }, "sections": [{ "widgets": [ { "textParagraph": { "text": "Originator:
" + ($json.meta.method || \"UNKNOWN\") + "

Status:
" + ($json.system_status === \"GREEN\" ? \"🟢 \" : ($json.system_status === \"YELLOW\" ? \"🟡 \" : \"🔴 \")) + $json.system_status + "

Intent:
" + $json.intent } }, { "decoratedText": { "topLabel": "Reason", "text": $json.throttle_message, "wrapText": true } }, { "decoratedText": { "topLabel": "Blocked Payload", "text": $json.meta.summary, "wrapText": true } } ] }] } } ] } }}

={{ { "contents": [{ "parts": [{ "text": "Classify this software change as HIGH_IMPACT or ROUTINE for the L2LAAF autonomous agent platform.
HIGH_IMPACT criteria: affects authentication, financial transactions, regulatory compliance (AGLC/CRA), agent orchestration logic, Firestore security rules, or core database schema.
ROUTINE criteria: UI changes, documentation, refactoring, minor bug fixes, logging, testing infrastructure, dependency updates.

Change summary: " + $json.meta.summary + "
Method: " + ($json.meta.method || 'UNKNOWN') + "
Intent: " + $json.intent + "

Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown: {\"impact\": \"HIGH_IMPACT\" or \"ROUTINE\", \"reason\": \"one sentence reason\"}" }] }] } }}

={{ { "resourceNames": [ "projects/" + ($('Approval Listener').first().json.query.env === 'prod' ? 'local2local-prod' : 'local2local-dev') ], "filter": "textPayload:\"Null check operator used on a null value\"", "pageSize": 10 } }}

={{ Object.assign({ message: $('Prepare Mutate Payload').first().json.commitMessage, content: $('Prepare Mutate Payload').first().json.encodedContent, branch: 'develop' }, $('Get Logic SHA').first().json.sha ? { sha: $('Get Logic SHA').first().json.sha } : {}) }}

={{ Object.assign({ message: $('Prepare State Payload').first().json.commitMessage, content: $('Prepare State Payload').first().json.encodedContent, branch: 'develop' }, $('Get State SHA').first().json.sha ? { sha: $('Get State SHA').first().json.sha } : {}) }}

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { requestBody: JSON.stringify({ message: `${$json.newVersion} - [AUTO] CHORE(version): Bump to ${$json.newVersion} (${$json.bumpType}) [skip ci]`, content: $json.encodedContent, sha: $json.currentSha, branch: "develop" }) } };

const sha = $('Get Develop SHA').first().json.object.sha;
return { json: { requestBody: JSON.stringify({ sha: sha, force: true }) } };

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ structuredQuery: { from: [{ collectionId: "deferred_phases" }], where: { fieldFilter: { field: { fieldPath: "commit_sha" }, op: "EQUAL", value: { stringValue: $json.commit_sha } } }, limit: 1 } }) }}
